description_long: This is a heavy-duty, vintage-style safe box constructed primarily from thick, dark metal with a slightly weathered finish. The front features a large, rectangular door bordered by a gold trim, with the words 'THE STABLE SAFE COMPANY' printed in gold at the center. A prominent, multi-spoke rotating handle and a circular combination dial are mounted on the door, both made of metal. The safe stands on four sturdy, rounded feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The sides and back are solid, with no visible openings or features, and the door is secured with external hinges on the right. The overall design suggests a robust, secure container intended for storing valuables in urban environments such as offices, banks, or garages.
description: A robust, vintage metal safe box with a gold-trimmed front door, combination dial, and rotating handle, standing on four rounded feet. The exterior is dark, weathered metal with a printed manufacturer label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold-trimmed door, combination dial, rotating handle, printed label, and right-side external hinges.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid, featureless metal panel and the rounded feet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, slightly recessed metal back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid metal panel and a partial view of the handle and hinges protruding from the front.
attribute_handle_design: multi-spoke rotating handle, centrally placed on the door, made of metal
attribute_brand_or_manufacturer_label: Printed label on the front door reading 'THE STABLE SAFE COMPANY' in gold lettering
